SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, William Henry Barnes, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, CCSF, appears through Deborah Honiq, Esq. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Bassi.
Ms. Honig submits a trial brief and an inclusive exhibit:
EXHR(1-9) Various papers related to the case
EXHA(A, 1-3) Various papers related to the case
Parties present closing arguments.
9:45am
Matter is submitted, evidence is retained.
